creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
Hello,

sorry for another reply, but here is yet another update.

This fixes:

	- update port to version 1.1.6
	- use wget to update the plugins

Best regards

--
Udo Schweigert, Siemens AG   | Voice      : +49 89 636 42170
CT IC 3, Siemens CERT        | Fax        : +49 89 636 41166
D-81730 Muenchen / Germany   | email      : udo.schweigert@siemens.com
